title: rosa × dumetorum f. trichoneura
intro: Rosa × dumetorum f. trichoneura, also known as a type of fragrant wild rose, is a plant species in the family Rosaceae. The medicinal properties of Rosa × dumetorum f. trichoneura lie in its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support digestive health. Rosa × dumetorum f. trichoneura can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and topical creams, allowing for a range of uses in traditional medicine.
